summary: Made two surgical seam edits: recast the opening to anchor more directly to the chapter 11 handoff while avoiding a similar time-stamp scaffold to chapter 13, and tightened the closing image so the chapter exits with the line still forcing work forward into the night.
edits: Rewrote the opening line and adjacent sensory sentence to start from the trauma-room condition rather than a clock cue.
Adjusted the final sentence to point more clearly toward the still-running line and the coming night-shift strain.
